\tzpentry{ID5274}{Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5274 introduces Gyromagnetic Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(A_{\text{total}}(r,t) = A_{\text{dipole}} + A_{\text{gyro}} + A_{\text{induced}}\)
\]
